summary: Small matching PR that decompiled fn_800DC044 in ftCo_Attack100 as a tap-jump threshold check, updated nearby header prototypes to include the gobj parameter name, and renamed the symbol at 0x800263B4 from fn_800263B4 to lbAudioAx_ObjFree. The automated report credited two new matches totaling +96 bytes: lbAudioAx_ObjFree (+52) and fn_800DC044 (+44).

key_files.role: Replaced the placeholder comment for fn_800DC044 with a bool function that reads Fighter input and compares lstick.y against p_ftCommonData->tap_jump_threshold.
Header cleanup: added the gobj parameter name to prototypes for fn_800DC014, fn_800DC044, and fn_800DC070.
Renamed the function symbol at .text:0x800263B4 from fn_800263B4 to lbAudioAx_ObjFree, preserving type:function size:0x34.

what_changed.text: Implemented fn_800DC044(Fighter_GObj* gobj) as a bool helper that gets Fighter* fp via GET_FIGHTER(gobj), returns true when fp->input.lstick.y >= p_ftCommonData->tap_jump_threshold, otherwise returns false.
Updated ftCo_Attack100.h prototypes for fn_800DC014, fn_800DC044, and fn_800DC070 to name their Fighter_GObj* parameter as gobj.
Changed symbols.txt entry at 0x800263B4 from address-style fn_800263B4 to semantic lbAudioAx_ObjFree.
Automated report recorded two new 100% matches: lbAudioAx_ObjFree in main/melee/lb/lbaudio_ax (+52 bytes) and fn_800DC044 in main/melee/ft/chara/ftCommon/ftCo_Attack100 (+44 bytes).

smart_moves.text: The fn_800DC044 implementation uses existing typed access patterns, GET_FIGHTER(gobj), Fighter* fp, fp->input.lstick.y, and p_ftCommonData->tap_jump_threshold, rather than raw offsets or M2C_FIELD-style access.
The header was kept in sync with the recovered function signature and local parameter naming style by naming Fighter_GObj* parameters as gobj.
The lbAudioAx symbol rename preserved the same address and size metadata while replacing an address-style name with a semantic one.

decomp_lessons.lesson: Very small input predicate functions may match cleanly as direct typed field checks against common-data thresholds, without resorting to raw offsets or matching hacks.
When a function body is recovered, update the owning header prototype surface in the same PR when the signature or parameter naming is known.

naming_conventions.name: lbAudioAx_ObjFree
naming_conventions.context: Semantic symbol name for .text:0x800263B4, replacing fn_800263B4.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use a straightforward if-return-true / return-false shape for fn_800DC044 rather than compressing the predicate into a single return expression.
Typed field access through Fighter and p_ftCommonData was sufficient for the reported fn_800DC044 match.
A symbols.txt rename alone was part of the reported lbAudioAx_ObjFree match; the slice does not show a corresponding C source implementation for that function.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report for GALE01 showed matched code 54.48% (+0.00%, +96 bytes) with 2 new matches: lbAudioAx_ObjFree (+52, 0.00% to 100.00%) and fn_800DC044 (+44, 0.00% to 100.00%).

notes: The full diff for the PR slice is available and compact.
The PR body is empty and there are no review comments in the slice, so author rationale and reviewer intent are not available.
The automated report provides match evidence for two symbols, but the slice does not include local build logs or objdiff details beyond the bot summary.
The lbAudioAx_ObjFree match is reported by the bot, but the diff only shows a symbols.txt rename for that function, not a C source implementation.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Small ftCommon input predicates can match with typed Fighter/common-data access
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2208 matched fn_800DC044 by using GET_FIGHTER(gobj), a Fighter* fp local, fp->input.lstick.y, and p_ftCommonData->tap_jump_threshold in a simple boolean threshold check.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use gobj for Fighter_GObj* parameters and fp for recovered Fighter* locals when the roles are clear
accepted_candidate_records.text: The PR names Fighter_GObj* parameters as gobj in the header and uses Fighter* fp = GET_FIGHTER(gobj) in the recovered body.

source_update_candidates.title: ftCo_Attack100 owns fn_800DC044 at 0x800DC044
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2208 implemented fn_800DC044 in src/melee/ft/chara/ftCommon/ftCo_Attack100.c and declared it in ftCo_Attack100.h as bool fn_800DC044(Fighter_GObj* gobj).
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path ownership fact for future searches; route through curator rather than promoting directly.

source_update_candidates.title: 0x800263B4 symbol renamed to lbAudioAx_ObjFree
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2208 changed config/GALE01/symbols.txt so .text:0x800263B4 is named lbAudioAx_ObjFree with type:function size:0x34.
source_update_candidates.reason: Candidate symbol/path fact; evidence supports the rename and bot-reported match, but not the rationale for the semantic name.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize this PR into a rule that all simple predicates should use explicit if/return instead of direct boolean returns; only this function's matched source shape is shown.
Do not infer reviewer approval criteria or merge rationale; there are no review comments in the slice.
Do not treat the lbAudioAx_ObjFree semantic name as independently proven beyond the symbols.txt change and automated match report included here.
